title: Centipede Control New Brighton | Staten Island Exterminator | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional centipede control in New Brighton, Staten Island. Fast, effective treatment for homes & businesses. Licensed exterminators. Call for service: $350-$550.
intro: New Brighton residents dealing with centipede infestations need fast, effective solutions. Our specialized centipede control services protect homes and businesses throughout this historic Staten Island neighborhood from these unwelcome multi-legged invaders. With treatments priced between $350 and $550, we deliver thorough extermination and prevention strategies tailored to New Brighton properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving New Brighton's unique mix of Victorian homes, modern apartments, and waterfront properties. Our licensed technicians understand the moisture and structural conditions that attract centipedes to Staten Island buildings and use targeted, family-safe treatments to eliminate them completely.
localContext: New Brighton's proximity to the Kill Van Kull waterfront and its blend of historic 19th-century homes and newer construction creates ideal conditions for centipede activity, especially in basements and damp areas. From properties near St. George Ferry Terminal to residences along Brighton Avenue, we've helped countless New Brighton homeowners reclaim their spaces from these fast-moving pests.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes common in New Brighton homes?
faqs.answer: New Brighton's coastal location and humidity from the Kill Van Kull create moisture-rich environments that attract centipedes. Older homes with stone foundations and basements, common in this historic neighborhood, provide ideal hiding spots. Centipedes also follow their prey—smaller insects—into homes seeking food sources.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to centipede problems in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to New Brighton service calls within 24 hours. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood's layout from the waterfront to residential streets, allowing us to reach your property quickly and begin treatment. Emergency same-day service is often available for severe infestations.

faqs.question: What does your centipede control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350-$550 service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points and moisture sources, targeted treatment of affected areas, perimeter protection, and follow-up visits if needed. We also provide recommendations for preventing future infestations specific to your New Brighton property type.

faqs.question: Are your centipede treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are effective against centipedes while remaining safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained in low-toxicity application methods, and we provide clear guidance on any necessary precautions during and after treatment in your New Brighton home.
